title: Just Tombstone
body:
# BETA
THIS MOD IS IN BETA! Expect some bugs and keep an eye on updates!


# Just Tombstone

_Just Tombstone_ adds simple tombstones to minecraft.

## How they work?
Every time a player die, all items and experience will be saved in a tombstone generated at the local of death. Right-clicking in the tombstone will retreive all items to previous slots and replace any item that already there, giving it to you later


### Trinkets Support!
Yeah it support trinkets, just and easy.
